title: Universal Jewelry
description: Adds compatibility between Iron's Gems n Jewelry and other mods
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16afba0bb65e0f10322c01e1385c341671bfc07b.png)

**Universal Jewelry adds compatibility between Iron's Gems 'n Jewelry and several other mods by allowing their items to be used as metals and gems.**

**This mod will not do anything without Iron's Gems 'n Jewelry installed. The mod is only available on CurseForge.**

Current mods this mod adds compatibility for:
- L_ender's Cataclysm
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
